titles.title: Asal Sayas National Strategy on Young Adult Cancers Act
Asal Sayas National Strategy on Young Adult Cancers Act
A bill to amend the Public Health Service Act to require the Director of the National Institutes of Health to develop a national strategy to address young adult cancers, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
